label: Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules

node.label: Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules
node.definition: Curriculum and mixture schedules control which examples, domains, difficulties, or modalities are sampled at each phase of training.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules is to connect Active learning & curriculum learning, Data collection, curation & filtering to downstream capabilities including Domain randomization & simulation curricula.
examples: substrate for Domain randomization & simulation curricula
combined with Active learning & curriculum learning
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Active learning & curriculum learning, Data collection, curation & filtering.

dependencies.rationale: Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules uses Active learning & curriculum learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules uses Data collection, curation & filtering as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules uses Compute-optimal scaling & training allocation as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
